---
title: "About Me"
output: postcards::jolla
---

<div style="padding: 14px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e5e5; margin-bottom: 32px; font-size: 16px;">
  <a href="index.html" style="margin-right: 22px; text-decoration: none;">Home</a>
  <a href="showcase.html" style="margin-right: 22px; text-decoration: none;">Showcase</a>
  <a href="textanalysis.html" style="margin-right: 22px; text-decoration: none;">Text Analysis</a>
  <a href="postcard.html" style="text-decoration: none;">About Me</a>
</div>

Hi, I’m Adam, a Malaysian student studying **Politics and International Relations at the University of Essex**.

My academic interests include political behaviour, quantitative analysis, and digital political communication. I’m particularly interested in how data and statistical methods can be used to better understand political behaviour and decision-making.

More broadly, I enjoy learning about history, cultures, and the systems that shape how societies and institutions function.

Outside of university, I stay active through **gym training, bouldering, and swimming**, and I enjoy **reading** in my free time.

In the future, I hope to work in **consulting or policy**, where I can apply analytical thinking and data-driven approaches to real-world political and organisational challenges.
